title: About Lihe Precision

banner.alt: about-banner - Lihe Precision Machinery manufacturing facility

headline: Engineering Precision. Delivering Performance.
companyIntro: LIHE Preform is a company headquartered in Taishan Town, Taiwan (R.O.C.), specializing in the design and manufacture of molding solutions for the packaging industry. In the high-speed world of beverage packaging, we understand that consistency is the foundation of profitability.
philosophy: As a Coca-Cola verified mold supplier in the Asia region, we specialize in delivering high-cavitation molds that meet the most stringent global standards.
business: Our product lines include PET preform molds, compression molds, cap molds, blow molds, and hot runner systems, among others. Please visit our Products section for a complete catalog. For more information or to request a quote, please don't hesitate to contact us. We are ready to be your strategic partner in molding solutions.

whyLihe.title: Quality Performance
whyLihe.description: CPK ≥ 1.33 — Our tooling consistently achieves process capability indices that exceed industry benchmarks, ensuring reliable and repeatable production quality.

whyLihe.title: Operational Excellence
whyLihe.description: Defect rates as low as 0.0064% — Precision engineering and rigorous quality control deliver near-zero defect manufacturing outcomes.

whyLihe.title: Maximized Efficiency
whyLihe.description: Minimized cycle times and significantly reduced scrap costs for your facility — translating directly into higher throughput and lower operating expenses.

values.title: Precision
values.subtitle: Accuracy in every micron
values.description: We hold ourselves to the tightest manufacturing tolerances. Every mold component undergoes multi-stage inspection to guarantee dimensional integrity and repeatable production performance.

values.title: Partnership
values.subtitle: Your success is our benchmark
values.description: We work as an extension of our customers' engineering teams — collaborating on mold design optimization, material selection, and production efficiency to maximize output and minimize downtime.

values.title: Innovation
values.subtitle: Continuous advancement
values.description: We invest in the latest CNC machining, EDM, and metrology technologies. Our R&D team continuously refines mold designs to reduce cycle times, improve cooling efficiency, and extend tool life — supporting rPET compatible and lightweighting initiatives.

values.title: Reliability
values.subtitle: Consistent delivery, every time
values.description: Rigorous project management and production planning ensure on-time delivery. Our molds are built to perform under demanding production schedules with minimal maintenance requirements.
